tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent at $112.80/bbl on Mar 19 (+10% from Mar 18) — Israel struck Iran's South Pars gasfield; Iran retaliated against Qatar's LNG hub and a Saudi Red Sea refinery; European gas surged 35%. Saudi Arabia warned of 'military actions if necessary,' breaking the 'defined exchange' framing. The 'bilateral deal' floor is collapsing. Intraday peak $114; working range now $110-130 in stress, $160+ in tail if Saudi Arabia enters. PTTEP and Medco remain the cleanest ASEAN equity beta; add on any dip toward $105.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent at $112.80 on Mar 19; ASEAN Energy Equities est. +5%. ASEAN Banks under acute pressure as oil-importer inflation risk and credit spread widening accelerate. Israel struck South Pars; Iran hit Qatar LNG hub and Saudi refinery — the 'bilateral deal' framing has broken down. Conviction in energy-over-banks pair remains high; Saudi Arabia's entry warning structurally removes any ceasefire bounce catalyst. Trim only if Brent breaks below $100 on confirmed ceasefire.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short — Elevated Conviction on Renewed Oil Shock
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 60.20 (Mar 19, risk-off). Brent at $112.80 and Qatar LNG hub attacked on Mar 19 — Philippines LNG import costs will spike materially above the $19.27/MMBtu carried level when new JKM assessment publishes. Israel-South Pars and Iran-Qatar/Saudi escalation eliminates any near-term ceasefire. PHP 60.00 has been breached; next stress level 61.00-62.00. Jones Act suspension and US troop weighing add geopolitical uncertainty. Stop only if Saudi Arabia and Iran reach bilateral de-escalation pact.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short — Oil Import Stress Back in Play
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR est. 17,150 on Mar 19 — crossing 17,000 as Brent surges to $112.80. Israel strikes South Pars; Iran attacks Qatar LNG hub and Saudi refinery — Indonesia's oil-import bill just jumped materially. ID 10Y est. 6.85%; Bank Indonesia in full intervention mode. IDR has now broken through 17,000; stress target 17,500 is in reach; tail above 18,000 if Saudi Arabia enters conflict. Maintain and reinforce the short-IDR position.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection — Hold Position
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG est. ~172bp on Mar 19 (+7bp); ASEAN HY est. ~530bp (+15bp). Israel struck South Pars; Iran hit Qatar LNG hub and Saudi refinery — Saudi Arabia now warning of military response. The 'confined bilateral exchange' thesis has broken down. 185-200bp is now the stress target on iTraxx Asia IG. Add to CDS protection; trim only if Brent breaks below $95 on confirmed ceasefire and P&I cover restoration is announced.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF — Keep Optionality
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM at $19.27/MMBtu (carried Mar 17 — Qatar LNG hub attacked Mar 19 implies materially higher, pending new assessment). TTF est. ~€71.56/MWh (Mar 19, +35% from news headline, oilprice.com). Iran's attack on Qatar's Ras Laffan hub on Mar 19 ends the partial restart narrative and reinstates acute supply shock. US LNG at capacity; Australian LNG is the only alternative. JKM-over-TTF long; the Qatar hub attack alone warrants adding size if JKM confirms a new assessment above $22.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window is fully closed. Brent at $112.80, iTraxx Asia IG est. ~172bp, ASEAN HY est. ~530bp — unsecured market inaccessible. Israel struck South Pars; Iran hit Qatar LNG hub and Saudi refinery on Mar 19; Saudi Arabia warning of military response. Risk premium extends indefinitely. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures now. Every day of delay raises execution risk.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB deteriorates further — TH 10Y est. 2.03%, USD/THB est. 32.90 on Mar 19. Brent at $112.80 boosts upstream EBITDA but Israel struck South Pars and Iran hit Qatar LNG hub and Saudi refinery — Thailand's gas import costs will surge. The local-duration window is closing as BOT easing probability falls further. Execute H2 2026 prefunding and run a sanctions/compliance review on any Gulf JV exposure immediately.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $112.80 and Iran's attack on Qatar LNG hub on Mar 19 spike Wilmar's feedstock and bunker costs. JKM set to reset materially above $19.27 when new assessment publishes. USD/SGD est. 1.2810. Saudi Arabia's entry warning adds catastrophic freight-route risk. The IG bank market window is still open but narrowing — execute before Saudi escalation re-prices trade-finance availability.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base probability 15%, stress 51%, tail 34%; Brent $112.80; ASEAN HY est. ~530bp. Iran attacked Qatar LNG hub and Saudi refinery on Mar 19 — gas-fired power costs are spiking directly into desalination asset economics. Saudi Arabia's military entry warning pushes any market normalisation beyond H2 2026. Unsecured market is effectively closed; pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures with urgency.
